name: cluster_endpoint
description: Endpoint for your Kubernetes API server

name: cluster_id
description: The ID of the EKS cluster. Note: currently a value is returned only for local EKS clusters created on Outposts

name: cluster_dualstack_oidc_issuer_url
description: Dual-stack compatible URL on the EKS cluster for the OpenID Connect identity provider

name: cluster_platform_version
description: Platform version for the cluster

name: access_policy_associations
description: Map of eks cluster access policy associations created and their attributes

name: kms_key_arn
description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the key

name: kms_key_id
description: The globally unique identifier for the key

name: cluster_security_group_arn
description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster security group

name: cluster_arn
description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster

name: cluster_service_cidr
description: The CIDR block where Kubernetes pod and service IP addresses are assigned from

name: cluster_iam_role_name
description: Cluster IAM role name

name: cluster_iam_role_arn
description: Cluster IAM role ARN

name: self_managed_node_groups
description: Map of attribute maps for all self managed node groups created

name: self_managed_node_groups_autoscaling_group_names
description: List of the autoscaling group names created by self-managed node groups

name: cluster_ip_family
description: The IP family used by the cluster (e.g. `ipv4` or `ipv6`)

name: cluster_security_group_id
description: ID of the cluster security group

name: cluster_oidc_issuer_url
description: The URL on the EKS cluster for the OpenID Connect identity provider

name: cluster_version
description: The Kubernetes version for the cluster

name: cluster_status
description: Status of the EKS cluster. One of `CREATING`, `ACTIVE`, `DELETING`, `FAILED`

name: kms_key_policy
description: The IAM resource policy set on the key

name: cluster_iam_role_unique_id
description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM role

name: cluster_identity_providers
description: Map of attribute maps for all EKS identity providers enabled

name: cloudwatch_log_group_arn
description: Arn of cloudwatch log group created

name: fargate_profiles
description: Map of attribute maps for all EKS Fargate Profiles created

name: cluster_tls_certificate_sha1_fingerprint
description: The SHA1 fingerprint of the public key of the cluster's certificate

name: node_iam_role_arn
description: EKS Auto node IAM role ARN

name: eks_managed_node_groups_autoscaling_group_names
description: List of the autoscaling group names created by EKS managed node groups

name: cluster_name
description: The name of the EKS cluster

name: cluster_control_plane_scaling_tier
description: The EKS Provisioned Control Plane scaling tier for the cluster

name: node_security_group_arn
description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the node shared security group

name: node_security_group_id
description: ID of the node shared security group

name: node_iam_role_name
description: EKS Auto node IAM role name

name: cluster_certificate_authority_data
description: Base64 encoded certificate data required to communicate with the cluster

name: access_entries
description: Map of access entries created and their attributes

name: oidc_provider
description: The OpenID Connect identity provider (issuer URL without leading `https://`)

name: oidc_provider_arn
description: The ARN of the OIDC Provider if `enable_irsa = true`

name: cloudwatch_log_group_name
description: Name of cloudwatch log group created

name: eks_managed_node_groups
description: Map of attribute maps for all EKS managed node groups created

name: cluster_primary_security_group_id
description: Cluster security group that was created by Amazon EKS for the cluster. Managed node groups use this security group for control-plane-to-data-plane communication. Referred to as 'Cluster security group' in the EKS console

name: node_iam_role_unique_id
description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM role

name: cluster_addons
description: Map of attribute maps for all EKS cluster addons enabled
